subcodes.first_line: O 'Ali, O thou who circleth round the Throne! Hearken unto My most sweet call, which, when raised, draweth all in rapture [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی یا ایها الطائف حول العرش ان استمع ندائی الاحلی الذی اذا ارتفع انجذب
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @naming of children; of individuals, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
